executives.name: Eric Brandt
executives.background: Mr. Brandt has been a director since 2011. He was Executive Vice President and CFO of Broadcom Corporation.

executives.name: Michael Callahan
executives.background: Former Senior Vice President and General Counsel of LinkedIn and former Executive Vice President and General Counsel of Yahoo!.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President, General Counsel, and Secretary

executives.name: Prabhakar Raghavan
executives.background: Prabhakar Raghavan has served as Senior Vice President, Knowledge & Information at Google since June 2020. He previously served as Senior Vice President, Ads, Commerce and Payments from 2018 to 2020. Before joining Google in 2012, he was at Yahoo! Labs.

tenure_dates.title: Head of Yahoo! Labs / Senior Vice President

executives.name: Maynard Webb
executives.background: Founder of Webb Investment Network and former COO of eBay Inc. He has served as a Director since 2006.

board_of_directors.name: Eric Brandt
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Brandt has been a director since 2011. He was Executive Vice President and CFO of Broadcom Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Roy Bostock
board_of_directors.background: Chairman of the Partnership for New York City and former Chairman of Yahoo! Inc.

tenure_dates.title: Board Member, Chairman of the Board
